title: Send emails from subitems

posts.author: nathanru (Nathan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I already spoke to every layer of Monday support, so I know that it’s not possible. Nevertheless, I would like to submit a feature request.

I created a board that I use for distributing tickets to events to our clients. Every item is one event, and every subitem is an incoming request. This is why, I add to every subitem (or person requesting tickets) the actual tickets to the event.

Now, I would like to be able to send an email, using Gmail, to this person in that subitem, adding an attachment that can be found in the same subitem.

Hope that you will be able to develop this very soon
